description:
Look up the NFPA 704 fire diamond ratings (Health, Flammability, Instability, and Special Hazards) for Acrolein, Sodium Chlorate, and Toluene using CAMEO Chemicals (https://cameochemicals.noaa.gov/). Determine the 'Area Maximum' for a shared storage area by identifying the highest rating in each numerical category and listing all applicable special hazards across the three chemicals. Generate a report at /home/ga/Desktop/nfpa_report.txt using the exact format provided below:

NFPA 704 Storage Area Assessment
=================================

Chemical: Acrolein
Health: [value]
Flammability: [value]
Instability: [value]
Special: [value or NONE]

Chemical: Sodium Chlorate
Health: [value]
Flammability: [value]
Instability: [value]
Special: [value or NONE]

Chemical: Toluene
Health: [value]
Flammability: [value]
Instability: [value]
Special: [value or NONE]

Area Maximum Ratings
Health: [max value]
Flammability: [max value]
Instability: [max value]
Special: [combined specials or NONE]
